traktDescription: Connect your Trakt account to sync your shows, movies, and library. Watch history and ratings within the app are synchronized with Trakt.
loggedInText: Your Trakt account is successfully linked!
loginSuccessText: Successfully logged into your Trakt account!
communicationError: An error occurred while communicating with Trakt.
termsAcceptance: I have read and agree to the <1>Terms of Use</1>.
traktNotConnectedSub: Connect your Trakt account to sync your watch history and lists.
deleteDataWarning: This action will delete your KaymakTV data (watchlist, caches) from this device.
traktSafeWarning: Your Trakt account will not be affected.
